name: Barley-Shiitake Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the shiitake mushrooms and set them aside to soak in plenty of water. They will need about an hour to soak.
2. Chop the onions, celery, and carrots.
3. Add the chopped vegetables and Michelle's Chicken Style Seasoning to a large stock pot with 8 cups of water.
4. When the mushrooms are soft, snip them into smaller pieces (approximately a square inch each) and add them to the pot.
5. Bring the pot to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer.
6. Cook until the carrots just start to soften. Add barley and continue simmering for another 10-15 minutes.
7. Taste the broth occasionally while cooking and add salt to taste as needed.
